title: HMI Particles
description: Adds some particles to Hold My Items
body:
![Title Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e1a1a3ef077290a492b626479265fcc686af80f.png)

## Description
Just a simple pack that adds some particles to [HMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items)

## Dependencies
- [REQUIRED] [Hold My Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items)
- [OPTIONAL] [Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts)

#

***If you have any questions or issues please either come to [my discord](https://discord.gg/yyu96tfSJw) or the [forum in the HMI discord](https://discord.com/channels/1346575587787014326/1459888582952091791)***
